scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip --publish never && mkdir -p release && cp "release-builder/LanDrop Clip-1.0.0-arm64-mac.zip" "release/LanDrop-Clip-mac-arm64.zip"
scripts.dist:mac:legacy: npm run build && electron-packager . "LanDrop Clip" --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=release --overwrite --prune=true --app-version=1.0.0 --asar && ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent "release/LanDrop Clip-darwin-arm64/LanDrop Clip.app" "release/LanDrop-Clip-mac-arm64.zip"
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 --publish never
